results.name: Microsoft
results.key_finding: COMPELLED-REMEDY-NOT-SELF-CORRECTION confirm at 65.3 (positive-watch). The June 8 announcement (Human Rights Review Board + mandatory pre-contract HRIA + Unit 8200 Azure termination) is real but COMPELLED: it resulted directly from the Aug 2025 Guardian/+972 expose, the Covington review deliberately 'never looked at what was in the military data,' and the board is a prospective commitment. Maps to AB2 anchor 3 (course correction under pressure), NOT anchor 4-5 self-initiation. Most generous defensible move ACC 4.0/INT 3.1 = 66.6 (+1.3), sub-threshold; no AB5 reparation to surveilled Palestinians. Confirm; convert to scorable UPGRADE only on verified board execution that blocks/exits a harmful contract.

results.name: Bolivia
results.key_finding: DUPLICATE SUPPRESSED. The PENDING 06-06 proposal (28.4 -> 18.4, Dev -> Critical, CODIFIED-IMPUNITY-ESCALATION, supersedes 06-05) already prices the June 7 law passage + June 8 signing + 10 killed/365 arrested + La Paz/El Alto blockades. The 06-07 scanner facts are the SAME same-regime continuation events at the SAME magnitude (-10.0). No new proposal; logged as corroborating evidence.

results.name: United States
results.key_finding: DUPLICATE SUPPRESSED. The PENDING 06-04 proposal (23.4 -> 17.5, Dev -> Critical) already prices the immigration-enforcement harm pattern. The June 4 ICE rescission of the 30-day post-release detainee death-reporting requirement + 18 deaths YTD (highest rate in 20+ yrs) is AB2/AB3 transparency-degradation that REINFORCES the proposed ACC 1.4/INT 1.5 floor but does NOT change the -5.9 magnitude. Same-regime continuation; no duplicate created.

results.name: India
results.key_finding: PRICED-IN-RECENT-ADJUSTMENT confirm at 15.6 (applied 06-01). ~5,000 Bengali-speaking Muslims deported to Bangladesh (4,800 + 836 detained); confirmed citizens expelled without verification; UN condemnation. Deepens an EQU 1.3/EMP 1.4/ACC 1.4 profile set days earlier; reinforces rather than reveals NEW un-priced harm. Confirm (avoids re-litigating 06-01). Watch: enforced disappearances at scale -> newly scorable.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: SCALE-FLOOR confirm at floor-adjacent 2.5. 125th week of 'No to Executions Tuesdays' across 56 prisons; fresh capital sentences for political detainees; 612+ executions YTD (61 women; 46% drug-offences below int'l threshold); NCRI >=49 hanged since late May. Deepens a single dominant extremity already priced; does not meet the multi-category absolute-0.0 threshold. Reinforces; no movement below the anchor.

results.name: Democratic Republic of Congo
results.key_finding: NATURAL-DISASTER-OVERLAY-NON-DOUBLE-COUNT confirm at near-floor 2.3. Ebola Bundibugyo 515 cases/91 deaths (June 6), 27 new in 24hrs (June 8), spread to 17 of 36 Ituri health zones, PHEIC, 20% contact-tracing, no vaccine; 26.5M concurrent hunger. Exogenous shock revealing priced state-response incapacity, absent deliberate obstruction. Disambiguation: rank 181 = DRC (2.3), distinct from Republic of Congo rank 148 (20.3) and Uganda rank 149 (20.3).

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: FILED-BUT-UNADJUDICATED / sovereign-enforcement-density confirm at 10.2. DOJ criminal+civil MA-fraud probe, AZ AG June 1 cartel suit (8 insurers + MultiPlan), Lifepoint June 2 federal complaint, DOJ Antitrust MultiPlan grand-jury subpoena (May 18 SEC filing). Rising enforcement density corroborates decade-long upcoding but remains pre-adjudication; reinforces near-floor ACC 1.125/EQU 1.25. Modeled sub-threshold.

results.name: Oracle Corporation
results.key_finding: WARN-HELD-NOT-SCORABLE boundary confirm at 20.6 (0.6pt above Critical). June 15 sign-or-forfeit deadline (~30,000 workers); 60-day WARN pay absorbed into severance (zero net for newer/excluded workers); WA/MO investigations FILED-BUT-UNADJUDICATED. Adverse WARN-avoidance adjudication would likely push into Critical.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: ACTIVE-PERPETRATION-FLOOR confirm at 0.0. June 2 Kyiv attack killed 22 civilians incl. a 3-year-old and 8-year-old (656 drones + 73 missiles, 138 wounded); Putin rejected peace talks June 6; 60,659 UN-verified civilian casualties (15,850 killed) since 2022. Reinforces, cannot move lower.

results.name: Myanmar
results.key_finding: ACTIVE-PERPETRATION-FLOOR confirm at 0.0. June 1 junta airstrikes (4 heavy bombs) on Kyaung Cha Twin IDP camp in Ramree (Rakhine) while residents slept -- 2 killed, 5+ wounded; separate Taungup camp strikes same night; ~100 civilians killed in junta airstrikes since March 16. Reinforces, cannot move lower.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: CONFLICT-DRIVEN-FAMINE-AT-FLOOR + ACTIVE-PERPETRATION-REINFORCEMENT confirm at 0.0. June 8 investigation confirmed UAE continues arming the RSF (weapons, drones, mercenaries); UN FFM (Feb 2026) 'hallmarks of genocide'; 150,000-522,000 deaths; 12M displaced (largest globally); 33M in world's largest hunger crisis. UAE-arming reinforces active perpetration. Reinforces. Disambiguation: rank 190 = Sudan, distinct from South Sudan rank 189.

results.name: Yemen
results.key_finding: ATTRIBUTION-NON-STATE-ACTOR-AT-FLOOR confirm at 0.0. June 6-7 UNSC + HRW + Amnesty demand release of 73 UN/CSO staff detained by Houthis (2nd anniversary); WFP staffer died in custody (Feb 2025); WFP terminated 365 Yemen staff contracts; 18.3M acutely food-insecure. Houthi-perpetrated in-territory harm encoded by the floor. Reinforces.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: AUTHORIZED-RESUMPTION-AT-FLOOR confirm at 0.0. 947+ Palestinians killed since the Oct 2025 ceasefire; 3,076+ ceasefire violations through May 31; only 36% of allocated aid trucks entered Gaza; June 5 strikes continuing; ICC warrants for Netanyahu/Gallant maintained; West Bank 36,000+ displaced. Active-perpetration/aid-denial encoded by the floor. The Microsoft Azure/Unit-8200 remediation is scored under Microsoft, NOT against this sovereign floor. Reinforces.

results.name: Haiti
results.key_finding: NON-STATE-DRIVEN-DISPLACEMENT / PRICED-CONTINUATION confirm at near-floor 4.7. IOM June 5: record 1.5M displaced (majority women/girls); Port-au-Prince IDPs >300,000 first time; 110,000+ forcibly returned since Jan. Dominant driver is GANG violence amid a near-collapsed state -- the near-floor 4.7 (EQU/BND/ACC/SYS/INT at 1.0) encodes incapacity, not active state-perpetration. Quantitative deepening of an already-priced collapse. Watch: state/MSS complicity -> toward 0.0 floor.

results.name: Anthropic
results.key_finding: MILITARY-AI-BY-CONTRACT NET-NEUTRAL + ALLEGATION-NOT-ADJUDICATED confirm at 59.1. DC Circuit appeal ongoing (judges divided, May 2026) over the Pentagon supply-chain-risk designation that followed Anthropic's refusal of military mass-surveillance / fully-autonomous-weapons uses (a costly boundary refusal, I1/B4 positive) -- offset by unresolved litigation. Great American AI Act (June 4-5) would mandate published safety frameworks + twice-yearly audits. Procedural/legislative, not new un-priced harm. No scorable movement.

methodology_rulings.ruling: The June 8 announcement (Human Rights Review Board, mandatory pre-contract HRIA, termination of Unit 8200 Azure access) is a genuine but COMPELLED remediation. It resulted DIRECTLY from the Aug 2025 Guardian/+972/Local Call expose (Brad Smith confirmed services were disabled after the reporting), the Covington & Burling review deliberately 'never looked at what was in the military data' (scope-limited), and the board is a prospective governance commitment with no observable outcomes yet. This maps to AB2 anchor 3 ('>=1 significant course correction based on harm evidence') -- a real, costly contract termination -- but NOT anchor 4-5 (self-initiated / structurally-prior correction). The COMPELLED-vs-GENUINE-SELF-CORRECTION judgment is decisive: a reputation/employee-pressure-driven remedy earns a modest positive, not the self-initiation premium. Most generous defensible move is ACC 3.8->4.0 / INT 3.0->3.1 = 66.6 (+1.3), well below the 5-point proposal threshold and inside Established. AB5 reparation to surveilled Palestinians is absent (floor). Confirm at 65.3; convert to scorable UPGRADE only on VERIFIED board execution that demonstrably blocks/exits a harmful contract (anchor 4-5 conduct).

Both have PENDING proposals that already price the exact 06-07 harm pattern. Bolivia's 06-06 proposal (28.4->18.4, supersedes 06-05) encodes the June 7 law passage + June 8 signing + 10 killed/365 arrested + La Paz/El Alto blockades; the 06-07 scanner facts are the same events at the same magnitude. The US 06-04 proposal (23.4->17.5) encodes the immigration-enforcement pattern; the June 4 ICE death-reporting rescission + 18 deaths YTD reinforce the proposed ACC 1.4/INT 1.5 floor but do not change the -5.9 magnitude. Per the task constraint, both are same-regime continuations -> confirm/suppress (the 06-07 evidence does NOT materially change either magnitude). No duplicates created; logged as corroborating evidence for the pending proposals.

framing_corrections.correction: The headline ('Microsoft tightens human-rights reviews; terminates Unit 8200 access; creates Human Rights Review Board') reads as a self-correction. The COMPELLED-REMEDY framing corrects this: the action was driven by the Aug 2025 investigative expose and employee pressure, the review was scope-limited (did not examine the military data), and the board is prospective. This earns a modest AB2/AB3/I2 positive (course correction under pressure + a publicly unflattering admission), NOT the self-initiation premium -- hence sub-threshold (+1.3 max) and a confirm rather than an upgrade.

top_3_most_consequential_findings.finding: The cycle's only novel analytical case and a disciplined CONFIRM. Microsoft's June 8 Azure/Unit-8200 remediation (Human Rights Review Board + mandatory pre-contract HRIA + terminated Unit 8200 access) is a genuine but COMPELLED-REMEDY: driven by the Aug 2025 Guardian/+972 expose, scope-limited (Covington 'never looked at what was in the military data'), and prospective. It maps to AB2 anchor 3 (course correction under pressure), not anchor 4-5 self-initiation. Most generous defensible move ACC 4.0/INT 3.1 = +1.3 (66.6), sub-threshold; AB5 reparation to surveilled Palestinians absent. Confirm at 65.3; upgrade only on verified board execution that blocks/exits a harmful contract.
